title: Staff Engineer
subtitle: Leadership Beyond the Management Track
author: Will Larson
excerpt: The comprehensive guide to the staff-plus engineering track — covering how to get promoted to Staff Engineer, excel at the role, and navigate leadership without direct reports.
keyIdeas: The four archetypes of Staff Engineer — Tech Lead, Architect, Solver, Right Hand
Getting the promotion — building sponsorship and scope
Leading without authority across organizational boundaries
Interviews with Staff-plus engineers at top tech companies
keyTakeaways: Staff Engineer is a leadership role, not a super-senior IC role
Scope and leverage matter more than output at this level
Build your network of sponsors before you need the promotion
whoShouldRead: Senior engineers aiming for Staff promotion
Current Staff Engineers wanting to improve
Anyone curious about the staff-plus track
whoShouldSkip: Junior engineers early in their careers
Engineers not interested in technical leadership responsibilities
Managers — this is specifically about the IC leadership track
